title: "Sanaenomics" Meets Geopolitical Strife: Why Japanese Yields are Bracing for a Steep Climb
tags: Bank of Japan March 2026 Monetary Policy MeetingThe Bank of Japan’s (BOJ) March Monetary Policy Meeting (MPM) took place against a backdrop of heightened market volatility, and the proceedings underscored the increasing tension between the “look-through” approach to temporary price shocks and the mounting fear of being caught behind the curve as external geopolitical pressures mount.Japan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
